name: Anchor
description: Start of turn 1: self-shield 1

name: Arrow
description: Replace damage sides with 'Kill an enemy with 2 or less hp ranged'

name: Autumn Leaf
description: Add growth to the rightmost side

name: Balisong
description: Replace the left side with '1 damage cantrip'

name: Ballet Shoes
description: Swap the left side with the rightmost side

name: Barkskin
description:
Immune to shields
+2 hp

name: Basilisk Scale
description:
Start petrified for 1
+3 pips to the top side

name: Big Heart
description: Replace the middle side with 'Heal 7'
notes: Clumsy, decent side with some synergys like dogma and enduring

name: Big Shield
description: Replace the left side with 'Shield 4'
notes: Upgrade for many t1s, makes Armorer great, can put on Reds like Disciple, later on Ghast/Doctor

name: Bone Charm
description: No hp penalty when defeated
notes: Pain/Death synergy. Not caring about having a hero die can simplify fights (like thorns)

name: Bowl
description:
Revert all changes to the middle column
(Replace middle column with my base middle column)

name: Castor Root
description: Replace blank sides with 'Heal 1'

name: Change of Heart
description: Replace heal/selfheal sides with 'basic shield' sides, retaining their original pips and other keywords
notes: Improves Red t1 immensely, many synergies including Steel

name: Cheating Sleeves
description: Add quin to the top and bottom sides

name: Cloak
description: Replace the middle side with 'Dodge all damage and enemy effects this turn'
notes: Dodge vs the Hand/Tarantus but too niche

name: Clumsy Shoes
description: Add heavy & eliminate & +1 pip to all targeted sides
notes: Maybe if you're super afraid of Floor 4 Troll

name: Coin
description: Add fumble & +1 pip to the left side

name: Compass
description:
Rotate sides clockwise around the middle side
(Left side moves to top side, top side moves to right side, right side moves to bottom side and bottom side moves to left side)

name: Copper Ring
description:
+1 empty hp
+1 max stored mana

name: Corset
description:
Replace the left side with 'blank'
+1 pip to the middle side

name: Courage Potion
description: Add potion & +3 pips to the left side

name: Doll
description:
Replace the left side with the above hero's base side
-1 pip to the five right sides

name: Doom Blade
description: Replace blank sides with '3 damage death'

name: Emerald Shard
description:
Gain the effects of all tier 2 items on other heroes
(Can copy the effects of items that are exclusive to a certain hero color)

name: Fletching
description: Add ranged to the left side

name: Glass Helm
description:
+3 hp
Death is permanent

name: Healing Wand
description: Replace the rightmost side with 'Heal 4 single-use'

name: Infused Herbs
description: Replace the bottom side with 'Heal 2 cleanse boost manacost'
notes: Boost is better than regen but still doesn't do enough

name: Iron Heart
description: Add exert & +1 pip to all sides
notes: Put on any 1 pip hero to get a turn ahead on t1/3. Synergy with Disciple, Hack, Stasis, Inner Str.

name: Knife Bag
description: Replace blank sides with '1 damage cantrip, pain'
notes: Can be picked with lazy/scoundrel protect against evoker low roll

name: Learn Poultice
description: Learn the spell: Poultice (Cost: 1 mana - Heal 2 singleCast)

name: Leather Vest
description: +1 hp

Revert all changes to the left side

You can cast spells from defeated heroes

description: Swap the left side with the middle side

name: Quiver

name: Rusty Plate
description:
Replace the middle side with 'blank'
+3 hp
